user.title: LANBON host
user.description: Enter the Mesh root panel IP and Bearer token (serial log or mDNS TXT).

data_description.host: LAN IP of the Mesh root panel.
data_description.token: 32-character hex token from the device log line containing token=.
Pre-filled from mDNS when available; confirm or paste from device log.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the LANBON host
error.not_root: Device is not Mesh root — only the root panel exposes the local API

set_channel_name.name: Set channel name
set_channel_name.description: Rename a LANBON switch channel on the panel (writes back to device).
